title: Pedestrians
body:
Pedestrians

An Australian Road Mod

What is Minecraft without roads or signs? With this mod you have roads, road signs* and this mod is best paired with Create. What we have exactly: Double Lined Roads/corners Dashed (Single lined) roads. Roadwork signs, Speed limit signs. Give way sign. Railway crossing sign and stop signs.

 

This is in development meaning it is NOT finished.

 

Credits: -MePix- for drawing textures and designing Car model. Thanks to Australia for creating these signs*. Thanks to Canva for me to create icon. Thanks to Blockbench for me to create Car model

 

*Not all signs exact
